category_sources: Official README says oauth2c is a command-line tool for interacting with OAuth 2.0 authorization servers.
source_facts.description says it is a user-friendly CLI for OAuth2.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use oauth2c.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, supported grants, client authentication methods, and flags.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/cloudentity/oauth2c; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README topics and feature list mention OAuth, JWT, OIDC, FAPI, PKCE, and multiple grant flows.
